query:
SELECT 'metas' AS tipo, COUNT(*) AS total FROM metas WHERE alunoId = 660014
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sessoes' AS tipo, COUNT(*) AS total FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE alunoId = 660014
UNION ALL
SELECT 'disc_resultados' AS tipo, COUNT(*) AS total FROM disc_resultados WHERE alunoId = 660014
UNION ALL
SELECT 'disc_respostas' AS tipo, COUNT(*) AS total FROM disc_respostas WHERE alunoId = 660014
UNION ALL
SELECT 'assessment_pdi' AS tipo, COUNT(*) AS total FROM assessment_pdi WHERE alunoId = 660014
UNION ALL
SELECT 'assessment_comp' AS tipo, COUNT(*) AS total FROM assessment_competencias WHERE assessmentPdiId IN (SELECT id FROM assessment_pdi WHERE alunoId = 660014);
